name: local-memory-mcp
description: Persistent local memory for any MCP client. SQLite, FTS5, Knowledge Graph. No cloud, no API keys.
long_description: Local-first persistent memory for AI agents. Stores learnings, decisions, sessions, entities, and observations in a single SQLite file under your OS data dir. 17 tools: memory_learn, memory_search, memory_recall, memory_decide, memory_session_start/end, memory_entity_create/observe/relate/delete, memory_skill, memory_goal, memory_health, plus aliases. Zero cloud, zero API keys, MIT licensed. Designed as the zero-config default for darwin-agents.

db_path.title: Database file path
db_path.description: Where to store the SQLite memory database. Leave default to use the OS data directory.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Full-text search across learnings + decisions + sessions

tools.name: memory_decide
tools.description: Log a decision with reasoning + alternatives

tools.name: memory_entity_observe
tools.description: Add an observation to an entity

tools.name: memory_entity_search
tools.description: Search entities by name + observation text

tools.name: memory_entity_open
tools.description: Load entity with all observations + relations

tools.name: memory_goal
tools.description: Set a goal with target + deadline

tools.name: memory_proactive
tools.description: Proactive suggestions based on stale items + open decisions + clusters
